name: 庙前咖啡
address: 越秀区庙前直街 16 号
tips: 周末下午人较多，建议上午去
vibe: 适合一个人发呆或带本书坐一下午
description: 藏在东山口红砖老洋房里的社区咖啡馆，木质家具与老式花砖让人仿佛回到民国广州。
imagePrompt: Cozy specialty coffee shop inside a historic red brick building in Guangzhou Dongshankou, warm afternoon light, vintage wooden furniture, patterned tile floor, single origin pour over coffee on table, soft film photography
recommendation: 想感受东山口文艺气息，从这里开始。

name: 红砖瓦砾
address: 越秀区恤孤院路 9 号
vibe: 适合周末 brunch 和好友聚会
description: 由老洋房改造的庭院咖啡馆，红砖墙、户外天井与特调咖啡构成东山口最悠闲的角落。
imagePrompt: Courtyard cafe in Guangzhou Dongshankou historic red brick building, outdoor seating under banyan tree, vintage bicycles, weekend brunch atmosphere, warm sunlight, film photography
recommendation: 带本书，点杯特调，躲在庭院里晒太阳。

name: 井里咖啡
address: 天河区六运三街 31 号
tips: 早上八点开门，适合通勤前买一杯
vibe: 适合社畜通勤、晚上小酌
description: 六运小区里最早的社区咖啡之一，天井、露台和熟人社交让它成为天河打工人的精神角落。
imagePrompt: Community cafe in Guangzhou Liuyun residential neighborhood, small terrace with plants, morning coffee crowd, local barista knows regulars, warm urban village atmosphere, street photography
recommendation: 早上一杯美式，晚上一杯特调，社畜充电站。

name: 小径咖啡
address: 天河区六运二街 7 号
description: 藏在六运小区窄巷里的极简咖啡馆，白墙上只有一条手绘小径，专心做咖啡这件事。
imagePrompt: Minimalist specialty coffee shop in narrow alley of Guangzhou Liuyun, white walls, simple wooden counter, pour over barista, serene atmosphere, soft natural light, architectural photography
recommendation: 咖啡师会认真给你推荐豆子。

name: 岛咖啡
address: 荔湾区沙面北街 53 号
tips: 户外座位看街景很舒服
vibe: 适合拍照、约会、悠闲午后
description: 沙面岛上被榕树和殖民建筑包围的咖啡馆，欧陆风情与珠江微风让时间慢下来。
imagePrompt: European style outdoor cafe on Shamian Island Guangzhou, colonial architecture, banyan trees, patio seating, afternoon tea, relaxed atmosphere, travel photography
recommendation: 点一杯柠啡，坐在户外看沙面的老房子。

name: 林荫道咖啡
address: 荔湾区沙面大街 14 号
description: 躲在沙面林荫道深处的小馆，窗外是百年古树，室内是满架旧书和咖啡香。
imagePrompt: Quiet cafe by ancient camphor trees on Shamian Island Guangzhou, large windows, bookshelves, reading nook, soft afternoon light, contemplative mood
recommendation: 想逃离人群，来这里坐一下午。

name: 青凤咖啡
address: 海珠区青凤大街 18 号
vibe: 适合年轻人夜咖、朋友聚会
description: 江南西青凤大街上的潮流咖啡据点，涂鸦、特调和晚场营业时间构成海珠夜咖地图。
imagePrompt: Trendy cafe on Guangzhou Jiangnanxi street, graffiti art wall, neon sign, young people socializing, creative coffee cocktails, urban nightlife vibe, street photography
recommendation: 海珠年轻人的夜咖据点。

name: 紫金大街咖啡
address: 海珠区紫金大街 36 号
vibe: 适合下午茶、和朋友聊天
description: 江南西居民楼下开了五年的温馨小馆，甜品和咖啡一样用心，邻里感满满。
imagePrompt: Warm neighborhood cafe on Guangzhou Jiangnanxi residential street, cozy interior, homemade desserts, regular customers chatting, community atmosphere, lifestyle photography

name: 骑楼咖啡
vibe: 适合游客、怀旧、逛吃间隙
description: 开在广州传统骑楼里的咖啡馆，把老广州记忆与咖啡香气混在一起，隔壁就是老字号。
imagePrompt: Cafe in traditional Guangzhou arcade building qilou, old street, red lanterns, blend of historic and modern, coffee counter, tourists and locals, cultural photography
recommendation: 逛北京路累了，进来喝姜撞奶咖啡。

name: 越秀书房咖啡
address: 越秀区北京路 312 号 3 楼
description: 北京路闹市里的一家书店咖啡馆，三楼靠窗位能俯瞰老街，安静到能听见翻书声。
imagePrompt: Bookstore cafe on third floor overlooking Guangzhou Beijing Road, bookshelves, quiet study corner, large windows, city view, warm reading atmosphere
recommendation: 闹中取静，适合带电脑待一天。

name: 花城汇咖啡
address: 天河区花城大道 89 号
description: 珠江新城写字楼缝隙里的快捷咖啡站，是广州塔脚下打工人的晨间燃料。
imagePrompt: Modern takeaway coffee stand in Guangzhou CBD Zhujiangxincheng, high-rise buildings background, business crowd, clean minimalist design, morning rush, urban photography
recommendation: 早上七点半就开门的打工人救命水。

name: 天环露台咖啡
address: 天河区天河路 218 号 4 楼
description: 珠江新城商场四楼的露台咖啡馆，城市天际线做背景，咖啡成了看风景的借口。
imagePrompt: Rooftop terrace cafe in Guangzhou Zhujiangxincheng with Canton Tower view, city skyline at dusk, outdoor seating, romantic atmosphere, lifestyle photography
recommendation: 傍晚来，看广州塔和晚霞。

name: 西关咖啡
vibe: 适合感受老西关烟火气、拍照
description: 藏在恩宁路骑楼里的社区咖啡馆，把西关老街的烟火气和手冲咖啡混在一起，窗外是百年骑楼。
imagePrompt: Cozy coffee shop in Guangzhou Xiguan arcade street, Enning Road, vintage qilou architecture, wooden counter, pour over coffee, morning light, local neighborhood atmosphere, street photography
recommendation: 想一次过体验西关和咖啡，来这里坐窗边。
